data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — Added 4 new RED tests (8-11) to tests/scripts/test-ticket-edit.sh: test 8 verifies --tags sets tags field, test 9 verifies empty tags array in initial state, test 10 verifies tags stored as array after comma-separated edit, test 11 verifies usage mentions tags. All 4 new tests are RED (failing) as expected.
